categories.name: Availability
categories.description: Measures availability via portability pass rate across configured OS/JDK targets (host + Docker).

findings.message: Target 'host-jdk17' PASSED. counted in weighted risk (weight=0.15)

Target 'linux-jdk17' COMPATIBILITY FAILED (exit-code). counted in weighted risk (weight=0.55) docker: error during connect: Head "http://%2F%2F.%2Fpipe%2FdockerDesktopLinuxEngine/_ping": open //./pipe/dockerDesktopLinuxEngine: The system cannot find the file specified.

Run 'docker run --help' for more information

Target 'linux-jdk21' COMPATIBILITY FAILED (exit-code). counted in weighted risk (weight=0.30) docker: error during connect: Head "http://%2F%2F.%2Fpipe%2FdockerDesktopLinuxEngine/_ping": open //./pipe/dockerDesktopLinuxEngine: The system cannot find the file specified.

Run 'docker run --help' for more information

metrics.description: Measures portability as a weighted compatibility risk across configured JDK/OS targets.

categories.name: Maintainability
